arts.ttl: Potter selects teenager Scarles in first West Ham team
arts.sum: West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Kilman, Scarles, Álvarez, Souček ©, Paquetá, Kudus, Summerville, Füllkrug The substitutes’ bench will be comprised of goalkeeper Wes Foderingham, defenders Vladimír Coufal, Aaron Cresswell and Scarles’ fellow FA Youth Cup winner Kaelan Casey, midfielders Guido Rodríguez, Andy Irving, Carlos Soler and Luis Guilherme, and striker Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: Is bringing Moyes back the right move for Everton?
arts.sum: They say in football there is no room for sentiment.

arts.ttl: Everton hopeful of swift David Moyes appointment after productive talks
arts.sum: Former manager set to return to Goodison Park Owners hope Moyes can steer team away from relegation Everton are hopeful of appointing David Moyes as Sean Dyche’s replacement after a day of productive talks with the club’s former manager. Moyes met representatives from The Friedkin Group (TFG), Everton’s new owner, on Friday to discuss a return to the club he managed between 2002 and 2013. Negotiations are understood to have advanced well and there is confidence a deal could be concluded within the next 24 hours. The length of contract is being discussed but the expectation is that it will cover the remainder of this season and Everton’s first year at their new Bramley-Moore dock stadium in 2025-26. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe prepares to send starlet to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Mbappe took over the Normandy outfit in the summer with an eye on developing young talent that could be sold on at a profit and the first major deal to be completed by the club under the stewardship of the Real Madrid star is Tidiam Gomis . Aston Villa are in “advanced talks” to sign a starlet from Kylian Mbappe ’s Ligue 2 club Caen.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth and West Ham eying moves for Marseille forward Elye Wahi
arts.sum: According to a report by L’Équipe, Premier League sides AFC Bournemouth and West Ham United are interested in signing Olympique de Marseille striker Elye Wahi (22) – who only joined…

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs West Ham - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Aston Villa get their FA Cup journey going with the visit of West Ham. Newly appointed boss Graham Potter will take charge of the third-round game between the two claret and blue sides. Aston Villa vs West Ham in the FA Cup third round is due to kick off at 8pm on Friday, January 10 at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Everton stars will feel no guilt over Sean Dyche's sacking, writes GRAEME SOUNESS: David Moyes is the sensible hire - but beware what awaits in that dressing room
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: There are no surprises in store for him whereas a foreign manager could possibly take half a dozen games to get into his stride.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth and West Ham in discussions over signing Marseille player
arts.sum: The French media are slowly getting into the swing of things in the January transfer window, and that means multiple Ligue 1 players being linked with moves to multiple Premier League sides. Friday has been a busy day for that, and it’s now the turn of Bournemouth and West Ham United.
